name: Anthony Cox
abstract: Anthony Cox (born October 24, 1954) is an American jazz bass player. He is known for his work with several leading musicians including Geri Allen, Dewey Redman, Dave Douglas, John Scofield, Pat Metheny, Gary Thomas, Marty Ehrlich, Ed Blackwell, Joe Lovano, and Dave King.

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: And there were various other configurations during the time that I worked with him. At one time we had Ben Riley and Ray Drummond, and some other people, like Jeff – oh, I can’t remember. Jeff – I want to say Smith. I’m sure that’s not the right name. Winard Harper, various – Anthony Cox. So, a lot
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Barron — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
